Title: User navigates to the homepage successfully
Preconditions: None
Test Steps:
1. User opens the application.
2. User clicks on the homepage link.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User registers with valid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Register" button.
2. User enters a valid username and password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the success page.

Title: User registers with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Data: Invalid username or password (e.g., empty fields).
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Register" button.
2. User enters invalid username or password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: User logs in with valid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters a valid username and password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User logs in with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Data: Invalid username or password (e.g., empty fields).
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters invalid username or password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: User logs out successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks on the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the start page.

Title: User places an order with valid product details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Place Order" button.
2. User selects a valid product.
3. User submits the order.
Expected Result: Order is placed successfully, and user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User places an order with invalid product details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Place Order" button.
2. User selects an invalid product.
3. User submits the order.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: User adds a product to the cart with valid details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Add to Cart" button.
2. User selects a valid product.
3. User adds the product to the cart.
Expected Result: Product is added to the cart successfully, and user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User adds a product to the cart with invalid details
Preconditions: User is logged in.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Add to Cart" button.
2. User selects an invalid product.
3. User adds the product to the cart.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: User checks out with valid cart contents
Preconditions: User has items in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Checkout" button.
2. User reviews the cart contents.
3. User proceeds to checkout.
Expected Result: Checkout process is completed successfully, and user is redirected to the homepage.

Title: User checks out with invalid cart contents
Preconditions: User has items in the cart.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Checkout" button.
2. User reviews the cart contents.
3. User proceeds to checkout.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid cart contents.

Title: User logs in as an admin with valid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters a valid admin username and password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the admin dashboard.

Title: User logs in as an admin with invalid credentials
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Data: Invalid admin username or password (e.g., empty fields).
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters invalid admin username or password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid input.

Title: User logs out as an admin successfully
Preconditions: User is logged in as an admin.
Test Steps: 1. User clicks on the "Logout" button.
Expected Result: User is redirected to the start page.

Title: User attempts to log in as an admin without being a registered admin
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Data: Non-admin user tries to log in as an admin.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters a non-admin username and password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating unauthorized access.

2. User enters an expired admin username and password.
3. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating invalid credentials.

3. User submits the form.

Test Steps:

2. User enters a locked admin username and incorrect password.

Test Steps:

2. User enters an expired, locked, and incorrect admin username and password.

Title: User attempts to log in as an admin with expired, locked, and incorrect username and password (multiple attempts)
Preconditions: User is on the start page.
Test Data: Expired, locked, and incorrect admin username and password.
Test Steps:
1. User clicks on the "Login" button.
2. User enters an expired, locked, and incorrect admin username and password.
3. User submits the form.
4. User enters the same expired, locked, and incorrect admin username and password again.
5. User submits the form.
Expected Result: Error message displayed indicating expired, locked, and incorrect username and password, and account lockout.
